name: 539 Plats Forts
summary: A tiny eight-seat Puigcerda destination counter for a serious Cerdanya meal if the itinerary allows a reservation.
whyItMatters: Stage 3 brings the trip through Puigcerda, and this is the most distinctive local food lead found: small, product-driven, and tied to mountain/Catalan sourcing rather than generic tourist dining.
pros: Reported as an eight-seat counter, making it highly memorable
Press coverage emphasizes weekly changing market-driven menus and local/small producers
Good fit for a special Puigcerda evening rather than quick race food
cons: Very limited seating means reservations may be difficult
Official hours and booking channel were not confirmed from a primary source
Coordinates are approximate from map search context and need verification
